name: Cinder Warden
flavor: Armored sentinel wreathed in ember mist.

name: Tar Serpent
flavor: A mire eel that climbs air like rope.

name: Shard Hound
flavor: A hunting construct of mirrored glass.

name: Refraction Drake
flavor: Splits into optical doubles when struck.

name: Dust Monk
flavor: Silent wanderer with bell chimes under robes.
